global_summary.note: 含 reuse 步：cache 側為 cached_data 讀出的 tensor，與 baseline 全算比較。

time_axis_note: step_idx 0..T-1：0=第一步(DDIM i=T-1)，T-1=最後一步(DDIM i=0)；per_block_step_error 的 key 為字串化的 DDIM timestep i

cache_scheduler_runtime_overrides.note: Overrides are unions on top of Stage1-expanded recompute sets; they do not replace the Stage1 scheduler JSON.

cache_runtime_override_contract.interpretation: Safety overrides apply only to the cache diagnostic render pass (runtime union). stage2_refined_scheduler_config.json masks are from Stage2 refine rules unless you merge policy elsewhere.

stage2_threshold_meta.note: Single global zone/peak thresholds (CLI). Per-block quantile thresholds 請用 build_blockwise_thresholds.py 產生 JSON 後以 --threshold-config 指定。
